text: <par>This form is found on Qiangyu Jianzhi p. 38. Jackson Sun’s Mawo consultant does not recognize this form; for him, <latinform>ʂə-z</latinform> means ‘canine tooth’; <latinform>dzə</latinform> ‘fang’. On Sun Hongkai’s own body part sheets, he gives the Mawo form <latinform>ʂə-zdi</latinform> instead of <latinform>ʂə-z</latinform>.</par>
